sections.paragraph:
- Original: μάλιστα

- Transliteration: Malista

- Phonetic: mal'-is-tah

- Definition:

1. especially, chiefly, most of all, above all

- Origin: neuter plural of the superlative of an apparently primary adverb mala (very)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Neuter plural of the superlative of an apparently primary adverb μάλα mala (very); (adverb) most (in the greatest degree) or particularly: - chiefly most of all (e-) specially.
